'''zhangosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:taa|taa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:taa|taa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhangosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhængesheth|zhængesheth]] || [[word:zhængeshej|zhængeshej]] || [[word:zhængeshesh|zhængeshesh]] || [[word:zhængeshe|zhængeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhangongoshoth|zhangongoshoth]] || [[word:zhangongoshoj|zhangongoshoj]] || [[word:zhangongoshosh|zhangongoshosh]] || [[word:zhangongosho|zhangongosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhangoshoth|zhangoshoth]] || [[word:zhangoshoj|zhangoshoj]] || [[word:zhangoshosh|zhangoshosh]] || [[word:zhangosho|zhangosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhangofshoth|zhangofshoth]] || [[word:zhangofshoj|zhangofshoj]] || [[word:zhangofshosh|zhangofshosh]] || [[word:zhangofshof|zhangofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhangoshotho|zhangoshotho]] || [[word:zhangoshojo|zhangoshojo]] || [[word:zhangoshosho|zhangoshosho]] || [[word:zhangoshoko|zhangoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhangoshoth|zhangoshoth]] || [[word:zhangoshoj|zhangoshoj]] || [[word:zhangoshosh|zhangoshosh]] || [[word:zhangosho|zhangosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhangoshothol|zhangoshothol]] || [[word:zhangoshojol|zhangoshojol]] || [[word:zhangoshoshol|zhangoshoshol]] || [[word:zhangoshokol|zhangoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhangoshothotho|zhangoshothotho]] || [[word:zhangoshojojo|zhangoshojojo]] || [[word:zhangoshoshosho|zhangoshoshosho]] || [[word:zhangoshoko|zhangoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhangoshothon|zhangoshothon]] || [[word:zhangoshojon|zhangoshojon]] || [[word:zhangoshoshon|zhangoshoshon]] || [[word:zhangoshokon|zhangoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhangoshothoro|zhangoshothoro]] || [[word:zhangoshojoro|zhangoshojoro]] || [[word:zhangoshoshoro|zhangoshoshoro]] || [[word:zhangoshokoro|zhangoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
